programs.title: To England, with Love
programs.desc: As far as Ali's concerned, she has it all. Until a mysterious quest sends her from Los Angeles to England on a treasure hunt through history, and she finds herself opening up to old and new loves all over again.

programs.title: Quest for Love
programs.desc: Mackenzie travels to Costa Rica with her best friend Ethan to secure cacao for her work at a chocolate company. She hopes that Ethan will finally see her through new eyes. When a tourist meets Mackenzie, his interest in her makes Ethan wake up.

programs.title: Garage Sale Mystery: Search & Seized
programs.desc: Every year, Jennifer and her friend Miles Wexford participate in the organization of an auction of goods seized by the police. The night of the auction, Miles is found dead in his store. Every clue points to suicide, but there is more to it. Jennifer learns that he was in serious debt due to a gambling problem.

programs.title: Valentine's Town
programs.desc: Working for a popular dating app, Jude heads up the company's plan to build a tacky, love themed resort in Arrowheart, his hometown. Standing in their way is a local business owner, Melissa the Matchmaker, who has rallied the town's residents against the resort. Upon Jude's return to Arrowheart he is shocked to discover that Melissa is his old high school love.

programs.title: A Match for the Prince
programs.desc: A medieval romance novelist is hired to be a matchmaker for a real-life prince in a desperate attempt to find true love before the fixed royal wedding date.

programs.title: A Toast to Love
programs.desc: A marine archaeologist works on a shipwreck, uncovers a romantic tale behind a wine discovery and sparks a romance with a Spanish winemaker.
